---
name: mobile-first-theme
description: '**WORKFLOW SKILL** — Ensure applications are built mobile-first with light mode as default theme. USE FOR: generating mobile-first CSS, reviewing code for mobile-first compliance and light theme. DO NOT USE FOR: backend logic. INVOKES: file system tools.'
---

# Mobile-First Theme Skill

## Quick Checklist

1. **Verify Mobile-First CSS**: Check that stylesheets use mobile-first approach with base styles fo/r mobile and min-width media queries for larger screens.

2. **Apply Light Mode Theme**: Ensure the default light theme (light backgrounds, dark text, appropriate contrast) is consistently applied across components.

3. **Review Responsive Components**: Confirm that UI components are responsive and work well on mobile devices first.

4. **Test on Mobile Viewports**: Validate the application layout and functionality on mobile screen sizes.

5. **Optimize Touch Interactions**: Ensure buttons and interactive elements are appropriately sized for touch interfaces.
